signal_evaluation.signal_a_reason: baseline_days_available = 0 < min_baseline_days = 3; median_volume_usd = 0 causes Query 1 INNER JOIN to return empty
signal_evaluation.signal_c_reason: deployer_clusters empty; top_holders_proxy available (9CbNrmTyc4o3rBrfKMZHRs7qHaaqDG2edFhH2adccMKt holds 81.47%) but 24h post-spike insider sell data not available in probe snapshot

notes: Primary regression for the zero-baseline gap (RAVE probe §4 Gap 2).
Probe analyst assessed confidence 0.92 manually; formula produces 0.75 because Signal C is unavailable in snapshot.
The 0.75 confidence is correct for a snapshot-time evaluation; real production detection at spike time would have the post-spike window for Signal C.
Also serves as negative fixture for D01 (no freeze/mint authority) and D06 (mint authority null).
Fixture data verified against RugCheck API live fetch 2026-04-21 and DEXScreener API live fetch 2026-04-21.
